sources.label: Compose Multiplatform resources SvgPainter raster-cache bug (CMP-10433), confirmed by the CMP team; source in JetBrains/compose-multiplatform components/resources SvgPainter.kt/DrawCache.kt

check.reason: YouTrack issue; no cheap commit/frontmatter signal. Anchors the icon-loading.md claim that Jewel SVG raster memoization is defeated (previousDrawSize never assigned). Re-check issue state before relying on the per-draw behavior; a fix would change it.
